title: Bridging Design Systems and Code with MCP and AI Agents
summary: Will Scott explains how design systems and context engineering guide intelligent agents to build consistent applications. The talk covers how MCP and AI agents work together as a technique for connecting software design practices with agentic AI systems.
writeup: This IBM Technology video explains how the Model Context Protocol (MCP) and AI agents connect design systems to code through context engineering. It covers how this integration guides application development so that AI agents produce work consistent with established design systems. The stated goal is building consistent and correct applications within modern software design workflows, with MCP and context management as the linking layer between design and implementation.
